justifications.completeness: The extraction reports one pedestrian and one vehicle while the ground truth contains two persons and five vehicles, so many objects are missing.

justifications.completeness: The extraction captures only two pedestrians and two vehicles while the ground truth lists five people and five vehicles, so most objects are missing.

justifications.completeness: The extraction reports only one pedestrian and one vehicle while the ground truth contains five persons and four vehicles, so most objects are missing and track IDs do not align.

justifications.completeness: Only one pedestrian and one vehicle were reported while ground truth contains four people and three vehicles, so many objects are missing.

justifications.completeness: The VLM detected only 2 of 4 ground-truth pedestrians and 1 of 3 vehicles and missed several annotated actions and transport states, so coverage is limited.

justifications.completeness: Detected only 1 of 5 pedestrians and 1 of 3 vehicles, leaving most entities and many attributes unreported.

justifications.overall: Overall quality is low due to poor entity coverage and limited accurate relations/attributes, despite reasonable detail for the few detected objects.

justifications.completeness: Detected only one pedestrian and no vehicles while ground truth lists six persons and four vehicles, so the extraction omits the majority of entities.

justifications.completeness: Detected 2 of 7 pedestrians and missed the single vehicle, so the majority of annotated objects are not reported.

justifications.completeness: Very few of the annotated persons and vehicles are detected (2 of ~10 persons, 1 unspecified vehicle) so coverage is poor.

justifications.overall: Overall the extraction captures a small subset of entities with limited and partly incorrect attributes, yielding low overall quality.

justifications.completeness: Detected only 3 of 9 pedestrians and no vehicles, with track IDs not matching ground truth, so most objects are missing.
justifications.semantic_richness: Provided basic attributes like atomic action, context, and age but missed several complex contextual labels (e.g., getting on a two wheel vehicle, pushing, biking) and misreported transporting for some persons.

justifications.completeness: Detected only 2 of 7 pedestrians and reported 1 vehicle that does not match the multiple ground truth vehicles, so coverage is low.

justifications.overall: Partially informative extraction with useful attribute structure but suffers from low recall, missing objects, and at least one incorrect vehicle identification.

justifications.completeness: Detected one pedestrian and one vehicle while the ground truth contains six persons and six vehicles, so many entities are missing and track IDs mostly do not match.
justifications.semantic_richness: Provides some attribute details (age, motion_status, doors/trunk) but misses key distinctions such as multiple pedestrians versus cyclists and omits many object attributes present in the ground truth.

justifications.overall: Partial and partly correct descriptions for a couple of objects but low recall and some misclassifications reduce overall reliability for driving-scene perception.

justifications.completeness: Only 2 out of 10 annotated objects are reported (1 pedestrian and 1 vehicle), missing most pedestrians and vehicles.

justifications.overall: The extraction captures a small fraction of objects and attributes with multiple misclassifications, yielding poor overall quality.

justifications.completeness: Many ground truth persons are missing and identities do not align, with only a subset of actors detected and several important actors omitted.

justifications.overall: The output is moderately detailed but suffers from low recall, some misclassifications (bike/person confusion), and spatial and identity mismatches leading to limited reliability.

justifications.completeness: Only one of seven ground-truth persons is reported and the extracted vehicle does not correspond to any ground-truth vehicle, so coverage is very low.

justifications.overall: While one person is accurately described, the system misses the majority of entities and introduces an erroneous vehicle, producing poor overall results.

justifications.completeness: The extraction detects only two pedestrians and one vehicle while the ground truth contains seven persons and five vehicles, so most objects are missing.
justifications.semantic_richness: For the reported entities the VLM provides multiple attribute fields (actions, context, age, doors/trunk) matching some ground-truth labels, but it omits or misrepresents several important attributes (e.g., biking, carrying) and many objects entirely.
justifications.spatial_relations: Some plausible relations are stated (pedestrians near bicycles, vehicle near pedestrians) but they are sparse, not grounded to specific ground-truth objects, and many relational facts are absent.

justifications.completeness: The extraction only lists two pedestrians and no vehicles while the ground truth contains seven persons and multiple parked vehicles, so most entities are missing.

justifications.completeness: The extraction only reports 2 pedestrians out of 7 annotated persons (and uses mismatched track ids), though the single vehicle is captured, so overall recall is low.

justifications.completeness: Detected 2 of 7 pedestrians and 1 of 2 vehicles, missing most people and one vehicle so coverage is low.

justifications.overall: Overall the extraction captures basic actions and a parked vehicle but lacks entity coverage and several important attributes, yielding a low overall quality.

justifications.completeness: Only one of five ground-truth pedestrians was detected and the vehicle count is correct but object ids and several person instances and attributes are missing.

justifications.completeness: Detected only 2 of 5 ground-truth persons and one vehicle, missing multiple pedestrians (including one carrying an object and one senior) and one standing person, so coverage is poor.

justifications.completeness: Detected only 2 of 7 pedestrians and one vehicle, so many actors are missing.

justifications.completeness: Detected 2 of 5 ground-truth persons (including one correct match) and omitted several pedestrians, though vehicles were correctly absent.

justifications.completeness: Detected only 2 pedestrians compared to 5 in the ground truth, missing multiple tracked persons and including at least one incorrect/mismatched track.
